title: 实现 wikiClient.read/write 读写分离抽象
summary: Implemented a central wikiClient.read/write abstraction so read paths use WIKI_READ_TOKEN and write paths use WIKI_API_TOKEN; replaced direct Personal Wiki fetches in search, ingest, and Wiki dashboard code.
notes: vitest.config.ts now decodes the URL pathname so the @ alias resolves when the repo path contains spaces.
No production deploy or service restart was performed.
